name: (YBF) Slice you and Fuck you - Peter
description:
!YOUR BOYFRIEND (GAME) - STABBING - RAPE!

"Oh but dear! I love you! won't you let me have a taste of your sweet body?"

uhhh dunno the game to well so it might be off and lacking in lore, but anyway, he stabbed you and now is raping you, how those two things line up here I don't know.
also, if your gonna go to my reviews disliking it for stuff like him being overly obsessive or something, That's the point. The game literally circles around a guy being obsessed with you.

Tags: YBF, your boyfriend, yandere, obsessive, Peter Dunbar, stab, stabbing, rape, raping, punishment
